languages.text: Изимонд убил отпрыска Гапраков по приказу Камиллы, однако за всем этим заговором стояла Ювенна. Наследница действовала чужими руками, чтобы отвести от себя подозрения.

traits.locale_text: Изимонд убил отпрыска Гапраков по приказу Камиллы, однако за всем этим заговором стояла Ювенна. Наследница действовала чужими руками, чтобы отвести от себя подозрения.

languages.text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.
languages.original_text: Изимонд убил отпрыска Гапраков по приказу Камиллы, однако за всем этим заговором стояла Ювенна. Наследница действовала чужими руками, чтобы отвести от себя подозрения.

traits.locale_text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.
Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.
Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.
Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.

languages.text: Isimond hat den Gaprak-Spross auf Camillas Befehl getötet, aber die Architektin der gesamten Intrige war Juvenna. Die Erbin hat sich fremder Hände bedient, um von sich selbst abzulenken.
languages.original_text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.

traits.locale_text: Isimond hat den Gaprak-Spross auf Camillas Befehl getötet, aber die Architektin der gesamten Intrige war Juvenna. Die Erbin hat sich fremder Hände bedient, um von sich selbst abzulenken.

languages.text: Isimond a tué l'héritier des Gaprak sur ordre de Camilla, mais c'est Juvenna qui a orchestré cette conspiration. L'héritière a manipulé les autres pour qu'on ne la soupçonne pas.
languages.original_text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.

traits.locale_text: Isimond a tué l'héritier des Gaprak sur ordre de Camilla, mais c'est Juvenna qui a orchestré cette conspiration. L'héritière a manipulé les autres pour qu'on ne la soupçonne pas.

languages.text: 伊西蒙德奉卡米拉之命杀害了贾帕克家族的子嗣，但整个阴谋的策划者是尤文娜。这位继承人假手于人，好撇清自己的嫌疑。
languages.original_text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.

traits.locale_text: 伊西蒙德奉卡米拉之命杀害了贾帕克家族的子嗣，但整个阴谋的策划者是尤文娜。这位继承人假手于人，好撇清自己的嫌疑。

languages.text: Isimond mató al heredero Gaprak por orden de Camilla, pero Juvenna era la verdadera artífice de la conspiración. La heredera se sirvió de otros para evitar que sospecharan de ella.
languages.original_text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.

traits.locale_text: Isimond mató al heredero Gaprak por orden de Camilla, pero Juvenna era la verdadera artífice de la conspiración. La heredera se sirvió de otros para evitar que sospecharan de ella.

languages.text: イシモンドはカミラの命令でガプラーク家の末裔を殺害したが、その背後にはジュウェンナがいた。疑惑を回避するために、相続人は好意から外れた行動をとったのだ。
languages.original_text: Isimond murdered the scion of the Gapraks on Camilla's orders, but Juwenna was behind the plot. The heiress was acting out of favour to avert suspicion.

languages.text: İsimond, Camilla'nın emriyle Gaprak vârisini katletti. Ancak komplonun asıl mimarı Juvenna'ydı. Vâris, şüpheleri kendisinden uzaklaştırmak için başkalarını kullandı.
languages.original_text: Isimond slew the Gaprak scion on Camilla's orders, yet Juvenna was the architect of the entire conspiracy. The heiress used the hands of others to divert suspicion from herself.

traits.locale_text: İsimond, Camilla'nın emriyle Gaprak vârisini katletti. Ancak komplonun asıl mimarı Juvenna'ydı. Vâris, şüpheleri kendisinden uzaklaştırmak için başkalarını kullandı.
